015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.oidc;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022import java.net.*;
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.function.*;
025
026import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.*;
027import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.http.*;
028import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.id.*;
029import com.nimbusds.openid.connect.sdk.op.*;
030
031/**
032 * Fetches a Juneau-native {@link OidcMetadata} record from an OpenID Connect provider's
033 * {@code /.well-known/openid-configuration} document.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * Wraps Nimbus's {@code OIDCProviderMetadata.resolve(Issuer)}.  The metadata is fetched once on each call
037 * to {@link #discover()}; result is not cached internally &mdash; callers cache themselves if needed.
038 *
039 * <h5 class='topic'>Usage</h5>
040 *
041 * <p class='bjava'>
042 *    <jk>var</jk> oidc = OidcDiscoveryClient.<jsm>create</jsm>()
043 *       .issuer(URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"https://login.example.com/realms/api"</js>))
044 *       .build()
045 *       .discover();
046 * </p>
047 *
048 * @since 10.0.0
049 */
050public class OidcDiscoveryClient {
051
052   /**
053    * Static creator.
054    *
055    * @return A new builder.
056    */
057   public static Builder create() {
058      return new Builder();
059   }
060
061   /**
062    * Builder.
063    */
064   public static class Builder {
065      private URI issuer;
066      private Consumer<HTTPRequest> httpRequestConfigurator;
067
068      /** Constructor. */
069      protected Builder() {}
070
071      /**
072       * Sets the issuer URL.  Required.
073       *
074       * @param value The issuer URL.
075       * @return This object.
076       */
077      public Builder issuer(URI value) {
078         issuer = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
079         return this;
080      }
081
082      /**
083       * Sets the HTTP request configurator.
084       *
085       * @param value The callback.
086       * @return This object.
087       */
088      public Builder httpRequestConfigurator(Consumer<HTTPRequest> value) {
089         httpRequestConfigurator = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
090         return this;
091      }
092
093      /**
094       * Builds the client.
095       *
096       * @return A new {@link OidcDiscoveryClient}.
097       */
098      public OidcDiscoveryClient build() {
099         if (issuer == null)
100            throw new IllegalStateException("OidcDiscoveryClient requires issuer(...)");
101         return new OidcDiscoveryClient(this);
102      }
103   }
104
105   private final URI issuer;
106   private final Consumer<HTTPRequest> httpRequestConfigurator;
107
108   /**
109    * Constructor.
110    *
111    * @param b The builder.
112    */
113   protected OidcDiscoveryClient(Builder b) {
114      this.issuer = b.issuer;
115      this.httpRequestConfigurator = b.httpRequestConfigurator;
116   }
117
118   /**
119    * Returns the configured issuer URL.
120    *
121    * @return The issuer URL.
122    */
123   public URI getIssuer() {
124      return issuer;
125   }
126
127   /**
128    * Fetches the IdP's OIDC metadata.
129    *
130    * @return The parsed metadata record.
131    * @throws IOException If the HTTP fetch fails.
132    * @throws OidcDiscoveryException If the metadata cannot be parsed.
133    */
134   public OidcMetadata discover() throws IOException, OidcDiscoveryException {
135      OIDCProviderMetadata md;
136      try {
137         md = OIDCProviderMetadata.resolve(new Issuer(issuer.toString()), http -> {
138            if (httpRequestConfigurator != null)
139               httpRequestConfigurator.accept(http);
140         });
141      } catch (GeneralException e) {
142         throw new OidcDiscoveryException("Failed to parse OIDC metadata for " + issuer, e);
143      }
144      var extras = new LinkedHashMap<String,Object>();
145      var json = md.toJSONObject();
146      for (var e : json.entrySet()) {
147         var k = e.getKey();
148         if (!STANDARD_FIELDS.contains(k))
149            extras.put(k, e.getValue());
150      }
151      return new OidcMetadata(
152         URI.create(md.getIssuer().getValue()),
153         md.getTokenEndpointURI(),
154         md.getAuthorizationEndpointURI(),
155         md.getIntrospectionEndpointURI(),
156         md.getJWKSetURI(),
157         md.getUserInfoEndpointURI(),
158         md.getEndSessionEndpointURI(),
159         toScopeSet(md),
160         extras
161      );
162   }
163
164   private static Set<String> toScopeSet(OIDCProviderMetadata md) {
165      var s = md.getScopes();
166      if (s == null)
167         return Collections.emptySet();
168      var out = new LinkedHashSet<String>();
169      for (var v : s.toStringList())
170         out.add(v);
171      return out;
172   }
173
174   private static final Set<String> STANDARD_FIELDS = Set.of(
175      "issuer", "token_endpoint", "authorization_endpoint", "introspection_endpoint",
176      "jwks_uri", "userinfo_endpoint", "end_session_endpoint", "scopes_supported"
177   );
178}
